title: acaena × pusilliviridis
intro: Acaena × pusilliviridis, also known as dwarf variegated caterpillar or red button, is a hybrid perennial plant of the genus Acaena, native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Acaena × pusilliviridis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Acaena × pusilliviridis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
